headline: Trump’s Iran blockade resumes, Kevin Warsh says the Fed has ’no tolerance’ for high inflation, and the most expensive dinosaur sold for $50.1 million. Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:
A new bill that had been championed by the late Sen. Lindsey Graham would give Trump fresh authority to impose tariffs on the largest importers of Russian energy
The House passed legislation supported by President Trump to make daylight-saving time permanent year-round, advancing a longstanding effort to end the twice-a-year time switch nationwide
